questions.question_text: Choose the most frequent congenital heart disease found in premature new-borns:
Which of the following congenital heart diseases does not develop in left-to-right shunt?
Congenital heart disease with decreased pulmonary flow is:
Classification of ventricular septal defects does not include the following type:
The optimal age for surgical closing of large ventricular septal defect is:
In ductus dependent congenital heart disease, the maintenance of open arterial channel is performed by the administration of:
In Tetralogy of Fallot the common clinical signs of chronic hypoxia are the following, except:
The major surgical indication for correction of aortic stenosis in children is:

answers.text: The value of transvalvular pressure gradient over 70 mm Hg

questions.question_text: In the diagnosis of congenital heart disease the gold standard test is:
In children with syntetic prosthesis the obligatory postoperative procedure is:

answers.text: Prophylaxis of infectious endocarditis throughout life
Anticoagulant treatment under the coagulation control once a month
Control of coagulation once in 2 weeks throughout life

answers.text: Emphasis II sound of pulmonary artery

questions.question_text: Organic murmurs can occur in, except:

answers.text: Magnetic resonance examination of the cardiovascular system

answers.text: Large ventricular septal defect with chronic heart failure

questions.question_text: MC. Changes of P-wave (P pulmonale”right-heart”) are detected in:

answers.text: P sharp, with high amplitude in II, III, aVF in pulmonary stenosis
